summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All new Team Hub page features and Player Profile redesign working correctly. 25/25 tests passed (16 backend + 9 frontend UI tests). The SportsPress-style tabbed Team Hub with 5 tabs (Overview, Roster, Results, Schedule, Venues) is fully functional. Player Profile page has hero banner with stat bars and 3 tabs. Navigation simplified to 7 items. Legacy routes redirect correctly.

issues: Player photo shows placeholder (yellow background) when image_url points to uploaded file - image loads correctly but some players may not have photos uploaded yet

critical_code_review_comments: TeamHubPage.jsx is well-structured with separate components for each tab (OverviewTab, RosterTab, ResultsTab, ScheduleTab, VenuesTab)
URL params correctly persist tab state (/team?tab=roster etc.)
PlayerProfilePage.jsx has proper hero banner layout with stat bars on right side
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation reduced from 11 to 7 items as requested
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified the major restructuring: 1) TeamHubPage replaces old TeamPage with 5 tabs (Overview, Roster, Results, Schedule, Venues), 2) PlayerProfilePage has hero banner with player number/name/info, stat bars on right, and 3 tabs (Overview, Statistics, Biography), 3) Navigation simplified to 7 items (removed Calendar, Venues, Seasons, Staff from nav), 4) Legacy routes redirect: /calendar→/team?tab=schedule, /venues→/team?tab=venues, /seasons→/team?tab=overview, /staff→/team?tab=overview, 5) Tab state persists via URL params, 6) Clicking player in Roster tab navigates to /player/:id, 7) Back to team link on Player Profile works correctly.

roster_tab: Position filter pills (Όλοι, Τερματοφύλακες, Αμυντικοί, Μέσοι, Επιθετικοί) - PASS
Full player table with columns (Player, Position, Goals, Assists, Minutes) - PASS
Player links navigate to profile - PASS

hero_section: Age, nationality, position, team info - PASS
Stat bars on right (Appearances, Performance, Goals, Assists, Minutes) - PASS
tabs: Statistics tab (stat cards grid, performance bars) - PASS

navigation.items: 7 items (Αρχική, Σχετικά, Ομάδα, Ακαδημία, Αγώνες, Νέα, Επικοινωνία) - PASS
navigation.removed: Calendar, Venues, Seasons, Staff removed from nav - PASS

backend_apis: Position filtering (Goalkeeper, Defender, Midfielder, Forward) - PASS
